verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Give me water from the well that never runs dry Give me water from the well that gives me hope when I die. Give me water from the well that never runs dry. And I will thirst no more.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Living water flowing from above Through the Spirit of never ending love. And I'm the first to declare my longing thirst For the water that comes from above.
